Home/Infrastructure

Our Infrastructure

Integrated, in-house manufacturing ensures quality at every stage — from raw material to export-ready packaging.

Our Facilities

Manufacturing Capabilities

🥜

Cashew Processing Unit

Our cashew processing facility in Gujarat handles the complete value chain — from raw nut receiving through steam conditioning, shelling, peeling, grading, and export packing.

  • Annual capacity: 3,000+ MT raw cashew
  • Semi-automated shelling lines with high recovery rates
  • Colour sorter for grade-accurate separation
  • Vacuum packing line for W-grade and splits
  • Cold storage for long-term kernel preservation
🌿

Dehydration Plant

A dedicated dehydration facility processes onion, garlic, and ginger through cleaning, slicing, dehydration, grinding, screening, and packing — all in a controlled environment.

  • Annual capacity: 2,000+ MT dehydrated product
  • Multi-tray and belt dryers with precise temperature control
  • Dedicated garlic, onion, and ginger lines
  • Hammer mills and pin mills for powder production
  • Stainless steel equipment throughout for hygiene

From Raw to Export-Ready

Cashew Processing Flow

01

Raw Nut Receiving

Incoming raw cashews are inspected for moisture, weight, and visual quality before acceptance.

02

Steam Treatment

Nuts are steam-conditioned to loosen shells and reduce breakage during shelling.

03

Shelling

Semi-automatic shelling equipment removes the outer shell while minimising kernel damage.

04

Peeling & Drying

Testa (skin) is removed and kernels are dried to target moisture levels (max 5%).

05

Grading & Sorting

Automated size graders and colour sorters separate kernels by grade with high precision.

06

QC & Lab Testing

Moisture, microbiological, and physical checks are performed per batch before packing.

07

Packing

Kernels are vacuum-sealed in food-grade foil bags, packed in cartons or bulk bags.

08

Dispatch & Export

Packed goods are dispatched to port with full export documentation.

Operational Strengths

In-House Processing

No outsourcing. All processing — shelling, drying, sorting, packing — is done in our own facilities.

Controlled Environment

Temperature and humidity-controlled storage for finished goods, preventing quality degradation.

On-Site Lab

Equipped with instruments for moisture, microbial, and physical quality testing without sending to external labs for routine checks.

Flexible Packing Lines

Multiple packing lines support bulk, retail, and private label formats simultaneously.

Questions About Our Capacity?

Contact us to discuss your volume requirements, lead times, and whether we can accommodate your specifications.
